flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Grand Canyon University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: For-profit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Grand Canyon University are 17% above the for-profit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($42.2k vs $36.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Grand Canyon University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (64.2k → 73.4k).
